assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and an email address or Google or GitHub identity.
No Confluent Cloud account, environment, cluster, topic, or connector exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Confluent Cloud account, launch a Basic Kafka cluster, stream sample data, and view the messages.

first_success.outcome: A Basic cluster is running, a users topic exists, a Datagen connector produces sample records, and those records are visible.
first_success.observable_signal: The connector status becomes Running and the users topic Messages tab displays produced records.

route_selection.surface: Confluent Cloud Console quick start, Section 1
route_selection.rule: Prefer the Cloud Console Basic-cluster quick start over CLI or API twins once signup identity and payment timing are fixed.

candidates.name: Email/password local user signup then Console Basic cluster quick start
candidates.reason: Local-user docs enumerate profile and password steps, but marketing tryfree and cloud signup surfaces differ and payment may interrupt cluster creation.

candidates.name: Sign in with Google or GitHub then Console Basic cluster quick start
candidates.reason: Official local-user docs present Google and GitHub as peer signup methods with different profile completion screens.

candidates.name: Confluent CLI or REST API cluster and connector path
candidates.reason: Quick start documents CLI and API as alternate interfaces to the same Console Section 1 outcome.

required_path.action: Create a Confluent Cloud account using local email/password, Google, or GitHub and complete verification.

required_fields.label: Full name
required_fields.notes: Documented for local-user and social finish-account flows; marketing tryfree form fields differ.

required_fields.label: Password
required_fields.notes: Required on the local-user password setup page after email verification.

required_path.observable_result: The developer is signed in to Confluent Cloud Console.

required_path.action: Click Add cluster, begin Basic configuration, choose provider, region, and single zone, then launch the cluster.

required_fields.label: Payment method when none exists
required_fields.notes: Quick start shows Set payment before Review when no payment method exists, even though free trial credit is granted at signup.

required_path.observable_result: Cluster Overview is available after provisioning.

required_path.action: Create the users topic with defaults.
required_path.observable_result: The users topic exists on the cluster.

required_path.action: Configure and launch the Datagen Source connector for the users topic.

required_fields.label: Datagen connector configuration
required_fields.notes: Quick start covers searching Datagen and launching with a users template; exact required controls can vary with Stream Governance and tutorial tiles.

required_path.observable_result: Connector status moves from Provisioning to Running.

required_path.action: Open Topics, select users, and open the Messages tab.
required_path.observable_result: Produced sample records are visible in the Messages tab.

prerequisites.description: Internet access and a Confluent Cloud environment that includes a Stream Governance package, as assumed by the quick start.

external_gates.description: Payment method may be required during cluster creation when none is on file.
Google or GitHub authorization when those signup methods are chosen.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email delivery and click-through for local-user email verification.
Cluster provisioning can take a few minutes after Launch cluster.
Datagen connector remains in Provisioning briefly before Running.

platform_outcomes.description: Signup grants the organization free trial credit for a limited period.
Launch cluster provisions a Basic Kafka cluster and opens Cluster Overview.
Running Datagen connector produces sample records into the users topic.

excluded.item: Section 2 Flink SQL queries on the sample data
excluded.reason: Quick start Section 1 ends at viewing messages; Flink is a later section.

excluded.item: Reading glossary and Confluent versus Apache Kafka comparison pages
excluded.reason: Documentation reading is not a counted product action.

sources.title: Overview of Confluent Cloud Tutorials
evidence_supported: Tutorial catalog pointing to Cloud quick start

sources.title: Manage Local User Accounts on Confluent Cloud
Confluent Cloud Free Trial
evidence_supported: Payment method guidance during and after trial

sources.title: FAQ for Confluent Cloud Billing
evidence_supported: Billing and payment method context for Cloud usage

sources.title: Start for free on Confluent Cloud

uncertainties.question: Does every new Confluent Cloud account receive a default environment with an eligible Stream Governance package before Section 1?
uncertainties.impact: A missing package adds environment configuration before cluster, topic, or connector steps.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account Console walkthrough confirming environment and Stream Governance state immediately after signup.

uncertainties.question: Which current signup URL and identity path is canonical, and is payment always required before Launch cluster despite trial credit?
uncertainties.impact: Signup field sets and a payment gate change required actions and external gates before first messages appear.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated capture of confluent.cloud/signup versus tryfree, plus a cluster-create attempt on a brand-new trial org with no card on file.
